orchestration.title: Orchestration Modes

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about notdemo.trade

beginner.label: Beginners
beginner.a1: It's a platform that runs multiple AI trading agents for you. These agents analyze technical indicators, debate trade ideas from different perspectives (bullish, bearish, risk), and present proposals for your approval. No trade executes without your say-so.

trader.label: Experienced Traders
trader.description: For traders familiar with TA and systematic trading.
trader.q1: I already do my own TA. Why would I need this?
trader.a1:
Three reasons:
1. **24/7 monitoring**: You can't watch 50 stocks across multiple timeframes constantly. The agents do вҖ” computing SMAs, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, and more.
2. **Multi-perspective analysis**: A debate mode pits bull, bear, and risk manager personas against each other. Pipeline mode runs sequential analysis. Both surface insights you might miss.
3. **Discipline**: Every recommendation comes with confidence scores, entry/exit targets, and position sizing. You approve or reject вҖ” no emotional trading.

Think of it as your TA, systematized and augmented with AI.

developer.label: Developers
developer.description: Technical deep-dive into architecture and stack.
developer.a1:
**Multi-agent edge-native stack**:

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  User Application (TanStack Start SSR)                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ React + TanStack Router                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Server functions (createServerFn)                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“ HTTP/WebSocket
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Data Service (Hono REST API)                           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Handlers вҶ’ Services вҶ’ Queries pattern               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Zod validation, error handling                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Deployed: Cloudflare Workers                        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“ RPC/WebSocket
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  SRP Agent Layer (Cloudflare Agents SDK)                в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Data Agents (market data fetching + caching)        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Analysis Agents (TA indicators, LLM analysis)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Broker Agents (Alpaca trading interface)            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Session Agent (AIChatAgent, real-time UI)           в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Orchestrators (Debate + Pipeline modes)             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Workers AI + 5 LLM providers                        в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Human-in-the-loop trade approval                    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                          вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Data Layer (data-ops package)                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Drizzle ORM вҶ’ Neon Postgres                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Zod schemas for validation                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”ңв”Җ Type-safe queries + Better Auth integration         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җ Shared across all services                          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Key characteristics**:
- **Edge-first**: Everything runs on Cloudflare's edge network (low latency globally)
- **Multi-agent SRP**: Data, Analysis, Broker, and Orchestrator agents with single responsibility
- **Serverless**: No VMs to manage, infinite scaling
- **Multi-tenant**: Per-user isolation via Durable Objects
- **Free tier**: Workers AI (Llama 3.3 70B) requires no API key

meta.title: notdemo.trade - AI Trading Agent
meta.description: Multi-agent AI trading platform that analyzes markets, debates trade ideas, and lets you approve recommendations before execution.

tips.title: Your AI trading session. Configure settings, start the agent, and review trade proposals generated by AI analysis.
tips.agentToggle: Turn the agent on to start automated analysis cycles. When off, no analysis runs.
tips.cycles: Number of completed analysis cycles since the agent was started. Each cycle analyzes your watchlist symbols.
tips.errors: Number of errors encountered during analysis cycles. Check 'Last Error' for details.
tips.pending: Trade proposals waiting for your approval. Each must be approved or rejected before execution.
tips.trigger: Manually start an analysis cycle now instead of waiting for the next scheduled one.
tips.noAnalysis: No analysis has been run yet. Start the agent or click 'Trigger' to begin.
tips.pendingProposals: Trade proposals generated by AI analysis. Review the rationale, confidence score, and risk before approving.
tips.lastError: The most recent error from an analysis cycle. Common causes: invalid API keys, rate limits, or network issues.
tips.chat: Chat directly with the AI agent. Ask it to analyze specific symbols, check positions, or explain its reasoning.
tips.orchestrationMode: How the AI analyzes trades. Debate: multiple AI personas argue for/against. Pipeline: linear step-by-step analysis.
tips.llmProvider: Which AI provider to use for analysis. Workers AI is free and requires no API key.
tips.llmModel: Specific model to use from the selected provider. Leave empty for the provider's default.
tips.watchlist: Symbols the agent monitors and analyzes. Comma-separated, e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT.
tips.broker: Which broker executes approved trades. Alpaca connects to your real/paper account.
tips.analysisInterval: Seconds between automated analysis cycles. Lower = more frequent analysis but more API usage.
tips.minConfidence: Minimum AI confidence score (0-1) required to generate a trade proposal. Higher = fewer but stronger signals.
tips.positionSize: Percentage of available cash to allocate per trade. E.g. 0.1 = 10% of cash per position.
tips.debateRounds: Number of debate rounds between AI personas. More rounds = deeper analysis but slower and more tokens.
tips.proposalTimeout: Seconds before an unapproved proposal expires. After timeout, the proposal is automatically rejected.
tips.strategyId: Active strategy template identifier. Determines the analysis approach and prompt engineering used.
tips.discussionFeed: Live transcript of the AI analysis process. Shows each agent's reasoning, debate rounds, and final consensus.
tips.confidence: AI's conviction level. Green (>70%): strong signal. Yellow (40-70%): moderate. Red (<40%): weak.
tips.entry: Suggested price to enter the position at.
tips.target: Price target where the AI recommends taking profit.
tips.stopLoss: Price level where the position should be closed to limit losses.
tips.size: Recommended position size as percentage of available cash.
tips.notional: Total dollar value of the proposed trade.

performance.title: Agent Performance
performance.description: Track persona scores, trade outcomes, and learned patterns

coldStart.title: Not enough data yet
coldStart.description: {remaining} more resolved trades needed (minimum {required}) before performance metrics are displayed.
